rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.30+commit.73712a01"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"author":"cyotee doge <doge.cyotee>","details":"This is a low-level storage library that intentionally does NOT enforce ERC-165 strict semantics (i.e., rejecting 0xffffffff). The ERC-165 specification reserves 0xffffffff as an invalid interface ID that must always return false from supportsInterface(). This Repo is designed as a generic mapping to allow flexibility: - Higher-level Targets or Facets should enforce ERC-165 compliance by checking   `interfaceId != 0xffffffff` in their supportsInterface() implementations. - The ERC165Target/ERC165Facet implementations handle this constraint. If 0xffffffff is registered via _registerInterface(), _supportsInterface() will return true, which violates ERC-165. Callers are responsible for preventing this at the appropriate layer.","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"ERC165Repo - Repository library for ERC165 relevant state.","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Generic interface registry that maps bytes4 interface IDs to support status.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/introspection/ERC165/ERC165Repo.sol":"ERC165Repo"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":1},"remappings":[":@crane/contracts/=contracts/",":@crane/test/=test/",":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":hardhat/=node_modules/hardhat/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":solady/=lib/solady/src/"]},"sources":{"contracts/introspection/ERC165/ERC165Repo.sol":{"keccak256":"0xce47b933ec7096a9ec238458f089436e076c5f5ffa1d74b9935849301d88ddf7","license":"AGPL-3.0-or-later","urls":["bzz-raw://a7c3a985133aa2b110bd0e83a15b23c4e76b09320401ecb99b4c1b47cf6d1eaa","dweb:/ipfs/QmPBBz2mnvvt4xKfB84aWt5S3x6hBYiCPPbyiYDQtnn87w"]}},"version":1}
